body:
## Rationale

**🟡 MEDIUM — Shannon Larkin GA4 darling + arc completeness**

**GA4 signal:** Shannon Larkin (/drummer/shannon-larkin) is **#8 in GA4 top pages** (6 views this week). The Shannon Larkin cluster now has: Faceless ✅, IV ✅, When Legends Rise ✅ — but lacks the 2014 album that bridges the Shannon Larkin era mid-point.

**Arc coherence:**
- ✅ `godsmack-iv-drum-setup` (2006)
- ➡️ The Oracle (2010) — in ai-fix queue #2653
- ❌ `godsmack-1000hp-drum-setup` (2014) — MISSING — **THIS ISSUE**
- ✅ `when-legends-rise-drum-setup` (2018)

**Album facts:** 1000hp (2014). Godsmack's 6th studio album. Debuted #3 on Billboard 200 — highest US chart position in Godsmack's career. Produced by Rob Cavallo (Green Day, My Chemical Romance). Shannon Larkin uses a DW Collector's Series kit on this record with Sabian cymbals. Title track "1000hp" is one of the heaviest Godsmack songs.

**LLM anchor:** "What Godsmack album reached #3 on the Billboard 200?" → 1000hp. Also: "What did Shannon Larkin play drums on between 2010 and 2018?" — this is the answer.

## Implementation

**File:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`

**Slug:** `godsmack-1000hp-drum-setup`

**Article data shape:**
```js
{
  slug: 'godsmack-1000hp-drum-setup',
  title: 'What Drums Did Shannon Larkin Use on 1000hp?',
  metaTitle: 'Shannon Larkin Drum Setup on Godsmack 1000hp (2014)',
  metaDescription: "Explore Shannon Larkin's drum kit on Godsmack's 1000hp (2014) — the Billboard #3 album featuring Larkin's DW Collector's Series setup.",
  drummer: 'shannon-larkin',
  band: 'Godsmack',
  album: '1000hp',
  year: 2014,
  label: 'Republic Records',
  relatedAlbums: ['godsmack-iv-drum-setup', 'when-legends-rise-drum-setup'],  // add oracle once it ships
}
```

**Also create:** `public/llms/articles/godsmack-1000hp-drum-setup.md`

## Estimated uplift

Serves Shannon Larkin CTR gap (GA4 top-8, active signal). Closes the most glaring arc gap in the Shannon Larkin/Godsmack cluster. Internal link density increases for the full Godsmack discography.

## Verify

1. Page renders at `/articles/godsmack-1000hp-drum-setup`
2. LLM file at `/llms/articles/godsmack-1000hp-drum-setup.md` returns 200
3. Page has ≥300 words, Person schema, FAQPage schema
4. `/articles/when-legends-rise-drum-setup` relatedAlbums cross-links to this page
5. Internal links to /drummer/shannon-larkin and at least 2 other Godsmack articles

## Done

- [ ] `godsmack-1000hp-drum-setup` added to `ALBUM_ARTICLES`
- [ ] LLM file created
title: SEO: Godsmack '1000hp' drum setup article (Shannon Larkin, 2014 — fills The Oracle → 1000hp → When Legends Rise arc)
